rule_model.never_rule: CardData.HasNever and CardData.HasAccess both treat requirement 103 as an immediate false/disabled gate.
rule_model.access_rule: A card with no requirements is base-unlocked; otherwise CardData.HasAccess requires every non-103 requirement to be present in the current DungeonUser/UserAttribute source.
rule_model.current_user_attribute_read: DungeonUser.GetAttribute(attribute) reads the int attribute list at DungeonUser offset 0x80.
rule_model.remaining_gap: This artifact models the requirement predicate; original GameManager.LoadCurrentUser save-file selection and lifecycle are not replayed.

enum_only_note.basis: UserAttribute contains WINCHAOS2 next to WINCHAOS/FLOOR1_CHAOS/CHAOS_HS, and ProfessionChaosMage exists, but AchievementList.GetAchievementList has no WINCHAOS2 row.
enum_only_note.inferred_condition: likely reduce the final boss under the champion-health threshold as Chaos Mage, matching other *2 profession gates
